# Engineering Skills

Skills used during daily code work on NexReel. Mix of NexReel-specific guidance and general engineering disciplines imported from [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills).

## NexReel-specific

- [api-design](api-design/SKILL.md) — FastAPI router patterns, `/v1` contracts, multipart parsing, response compatibility.
- [database](database/SKILL.md) — PostgreSQL schema, `database/schema.sql`, Alembic, repository query patterns.
- [docker](docker/SKILL.md) — Compose services, `justfile`, local startup, backups, schema bootstrap.
- [frontend](frontend/SKILL.md) — React/Vite patterns, context, Plex badge, SonarQube quality rules for JSX.
- [new-entity](new-entity/SKILL.md) — Workflow for adding a new NexReel resource across schema, repository, router, and tests.
- [quality](quality/SKILL.md) — Naming, error handling, serializer discipline, maintainable FastAPI code.
- [security](security/SKILL.md) — Session auth, password hashing, CORS, admin backup header, secret handling.
- [testing](testing/SKILL.md) — Pytest and smoke-test strategy for the current NexReel backend.

## General (imported)

- [diagnose](diagnose/SKILL.md) — Disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and performance regressions.
- [grill-with-docs](grill-with-docs/SKILL.md) — Stress-test a plan against the existing codebase and sharpen domain terms.
- [tdd](tdd/SKILL.md) — Red-green-refactor loop with vertical slices and integration-style tests.
